review_text: The font is way too small to read comfortably at night.
Nice paper but the font too small for my tired eyes.
Honestly the font is too small and I wish it were bigger.
There is no room to write in the afternoon section.
Arrived late and the shipping was slow.
Love the layout but the font too small for me.
Pages bleed through with gel pens.
Good planner overall and does the job.
